hero.title:

hero.subtitle: Join 10,000+ happy customers. Pay ONLY when you receive the product.
hero.trustText: No Credit Card Required • Cash on Delivery

steps.title: Chat with Us
steps.description: Click the button to open WhatsApp.

steps.title: Send Details
steps.description: Send us your delivery address and name.

steps.title: Pay on Delivery
steps.description: Receive the item in 2-3 days and pay cash to the driver.

links.content: We collect the contact details you submit only to respond to your inquiry, arrange consultation, confirm delivery details, and provide customer support. We do not sell your personal information. You can contact support@trendmart.com to request access, correction, or deletion of your submitted information.

By submitting an inquiry, you agree that TrendMart COD may contact you about your request through the contact details you provide. Information on this page is for product consultation and lead generation only. Final availability, delivery timing, and service details will be confirmed by our support team.

items.content: Got it exactly as described. The delivery guy was very polite!
